updates.title: 🚨 Action Required: Update to the Official AI Store App
updates.description:
The official AI Store is now live on the Google Play Store.
This older version is obsolete and will no longer receive weekly news or AI tool updates.
We have upgraded the experience with a Live RSS Feed, over 1000+ AI Tools, and the all-new Prompt Vault.
Please uninstall this version and transition to the official app to continue exploring the AI ecosystem.
Download now: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.snpixel.aistore
